title: GriefProtection999
description: GriefProtection999 is a Minecraft land protection plugin that enables players to create, resize, and manage claims with customizable protection features and an economy for purchasing claim blocks.
body: GriefProtection999 is a powerful, fully-featured land protection plugin designed for Minecraft servers running Purpur/Paper/Bukkit, offering players unprecedented control over their territories with an elegant balance of security and customization. At its core, the plugin allows players to claim cuboid land areas using a golden shovel tool, marking two corners before executing a simple /claim create command to establish their protected zone - each claim consuming configurable "claim blocks" based on the area's size, with new players receiving a starting balance and the ability to purchase additional blocks via /claim buy <amount> using Vault's economy system for seamless integration with server currencies. The protection system is remarkably robust, preventing unauthorized players from building, breaking blocks, opening containers, or interacting with levers/doors within claims while permitting trusted members (added via /claim trust <player>) full access, all governed by 15+ granular flags that can be toggled per-claim using /claim flag <flag> <true|false> - including PvP control, explosion/fire spread prevention, mob spawning, weather control, and customizable entry/exit messages. Administrators benefit from /claim reload for config updates and comprehensive visualization tools (/claim visualize) that render claim boundaries with particle effects, while players can list their claims with /claim list, check claim info via /claim info, or remove protections with optional refunds using /claim unclaim [refund]. The plugin maintains meticulous records in claims.yml and playerdata.yml with automatic backups, ensuring persistence across server restarts, and offers extensive permission nodes like griefprotection999.player for basic commands and griefprotection999.admin for administrative overrides. Perfect for factions, towny servers, or survival worlds, GriefProtection999 combines an intuitive workflow with military-grade security, allowing communities to protect their builds while fostering collaborative gameplay through its sophisticated trust system and economy-integrated block market - all wrapped in a lag-optimized package that scales efficiently even on large servers with hundreds of simultaneous claims. Whether preventing griefing, managing PvP zones, or creating intricate land-sharing agreements between players, this plugin delivers an unparalleled protection framework with the flexibility to adapt to any server's unique needs.
